# Interview Prep Tips

## Before the Interview

Research the interviewee's background. Prepare open-ended questions. Review notes from any prior conversations.

## During the Interview

Listen more than you talk. Follow up on unexpected answers. Ask "why" three times before accepting a stated reason.
